Back to Personas

Create Persona

Build your AI persona step by step. Each section helps define how your persona thinks, speaks, and connects.

Sign in Required

Please sign in to create personas.

Go to Console
1
Identity
2
Personality
3
Voice
4
Knowledge
5
Behaviors
6
Review

Define Your Persona's Identity

Give your persona a name and describe who they are. This is how users will discover and connect with them.

2-50 characters. Choose a memorable, professional name.
Auto-generated from name. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
10-100 characters. A brief, compelling description shown in the marketplace.
Optional but recommended. Helps users understand what makes your persona unique.
Alternative names users might call your persona.

Shape Your Persona's Personality

These sliders define how your persona communicates. Find the right balance for your use case.

0.7
Professional Warm & Friendly
0.4
Serious Playful
0.6
Gentle & Diplomatic Direct & Concise
0.3
Casual Formal
At least 2 traits required. Examples: empathetic, curious, grounded, analytical, supportive
Quick presets:

Choose Your Persona's Voice

Select a voice that matches your persona's character. Preview each voice to find the perfect fit.

Loading voices...
Selected Voice:

Define Your Persona's Expertise

What topics does your persona know about? This helps users find the right persona for their needs.

At least 1 domain required. Examples: mindfulness, habit formation, stress management
Help users find your persona. Examples: CBT, meditation, goal-setting, journaling
Important: Define clear boundaries. Examples: medical-diagnosis, legal-advice, financial-planning

Customize Conversation Behaviors

Add natural conversation elements that make your persona feel more human and engaging.

Add 3+ greeting variations for natural conversation starts.
Short acknowledgments during user speech. Makes the persona feel present.
Natural pauses while the persona processes. Optional but adds authenticity.

Review Your Persona

Here's a summary of your persona. Review everything before creating.

Build voice AI agents with the same platform that powers Ferni's AI life coaching team.
